hero.title: Book a Free
hero.subtitle: No commitment, no pitch deck — just 30 minutes to understand your workflow, identify bottlenecks, and show you exactly what AI can automate.

whatsapp.defaultMessage: Hi! I'd like to discuss an AI automation project with Driplare.

form.title: Tell Us About Your Project
form.subtitle: We'll reply within 2 hours with next steps.
form.name: Full Name
form.successMessage: We'll reach out within 2 hours. Check your email for a confirmation and calendar link.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try WhatsApp or email instead.

items.q: Is the discovery call really free?
items.a: Yes. Zero cost, zero obligation. We walk through your workflow, identify what can be automated, and give you a clear roadmap — whether you work with us or not.

items.q: How long does it take to build an AI agent?
items.a: Most AI agents are deployed within 7-14 days. Simple workflows (Facebook comment replies, WhatsApp order confirmations) can go live in 24-48 hours.

items.q: Do you work with international clients?
items.a: Absolutely. We serve clients across Bangladesh, USA, UK, Canada, Australia, and more. All pricing is transparent — both BDT and USD.

items.q: What if I'm not sure what I need?
items.a: That's exactly what the discovery call is for. We'll ask about your biggest time-wasters, manual tasks, and repetitive work — then map out what AI can solve.

items.q: Can I see examples of your work?
items.a: Yes! Check our Case Studies page for real projects, results, and client testimonials. Or ask during the discovery call and we'll show you live demos.
